description: During a routine IT security audit, the Electronic Data Capture (EDC) system was found to be non-compliant with FDA 21 CFR Part 11 requirements regarding password expiration and complexity. Furthermore, the auditor discovered that a Clinical Data Manager (username 'mrivera') may have had their credentials compromised. As the Systems Analyst, harden the system parameters and force a password reset for the compromised account. Update the OpenClinica configuration file (/usr/local/tomcat/webapps/OpenClinica/WEB-INF/classes/datainfo.properties) in the 'oc-app' container to enforce a minimum password length of 12, a 90-day password expiration, and set the support email to 'audit-support@clinical-trials.org'. In the 'oc-postgres' database ('openclinica'), update the user_account table for 'mrivera' to set the password timestamp to a date at least 90 days in the past to trigger an immediate password expiration. Ensure the application is restarted and accessible with the new configurations active.
